case_title: ANTHONY SANCHEZ VS. PLACE PIGALLE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT PLACE PIGALLE A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP NOTO, GREGORY AS INDIVIDUAL AND PARTNER IN PLACE PIGALLE, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP PERKINS, JASON AS INDIVIDUAL AND PARTNER IN PLACE PIGALLE, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP PARISH ENTERTAINMENT GROUP, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
